Welcome to

Hot Wheels & High Heels

The speed limit is 140mph but some cars go faster than that!
Watch out, you might catch a flash

These writers are brought to you from the Mediterranean center of Southern California,
where the Pacific meets the West Coast
a dreamy place of palm trees & perfect sun

Interviews

Jon Tobias
Alana Rodriguez
Angela Mendoza
Jack Hinzo
a.benét
Sam Yaziji

Poetry

"For that swirling pile of trash" by Alana Rodriguez

RIP My 2000 Toyota 4runner
you were the hottest salvage on these sunny roads
